goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'attraction type', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
Make sure you get address, attraction type, and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get phone number
